The '''YVH 5-S Bugcruncher''' was a spaceflight-capable variation of the highly successful [[YVH-Series battle droid|YVH-series]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] developed by [[Tendrando Arms]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Though they were built primarily to combat the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]], they retained the YVH designation and were first used by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to attack the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] on [[Kr]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in orbit over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qoribu]] in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]].

An entire [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of Bugcrunchers known as [[Stomper Brigade]], under the command of [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], were used by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] in the [[Battle of Tenupe]] to retake [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']].

==Behind the scenes==
The YVH 5-S Bugcruncher war droid appears in [[Troy Denning]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Dark Nest Trilogy]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''
